The Jury for The International Architecture Awards for 2025




 Sang Dae Lee
 Flavio Manzoni
 CHIU Chen-Yu
 Almantas Samalavičius
The International Architecture Award Yearbook

The International Architecture Awards Yearbook " New International Architecture Global Design + Urbanism" is an annual publication organized jointly by The Chicago Athenaeum: Museum of Architecture and Design and the European Centre for Architecture, Art, Design, and Urban Studies. This prestigious yearbook features outstanding architectural projects from around the globe, emphasizing innovation, sustainability, and design excellence. Including detailed descriptions, stunning imagery, and expert commentary, it celebrates the most remarkable achievements in international architecture for the year. The publication serves as an inspiring resource for architects, designers, scholars, and enthusiasts, offering insights into the latest trends and significant contributions shaping the future of global architecture.

Order your Copy Today

Log in your account in order to submit your project for International Architecture Award. The information and project details provided here must be accurate. All information submitted will be included in all online presentation, exhibition and Award publication catalogue. Please ensure that possible changes or mistakes according to credits, images and project description may incur costs.
